payload.answer: No durable content memory should be committed from this input; only the fetch failure may be retained as metadata.
payload.decision: Do not store the article as durable content memory because no article content was उपलब्ध; only the fetch failure context can be recorded, if needed.

entity_resolution.reason: The referenced article could not be fetched, so there is insufficient evidence to resolve it to a durable source entity beyond the URL itself.

payload.intent: Evaluate whether to store a memory about the referenced article given the fetch failure.

memory_cards.statement: A request referenced https://example.com/missing with the note that it is useful for memory architecture, but the mock fetch result was a 404 network error.

details: Preserved ambiguity by not inferring content from the URL or note.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL if source availability changes.
Ask the user for the article text or a working link.
Store only the access failure as a transient event, not article claims.
